title: carya glabra var. hirsuta
intro: Carya glabra var. hirsuta, also known as the hirsute shagbark hickory, is a variant of the shagbark hickory tree, characterized by its distinctive shaggy bark and edible nuts. The medicinal properties of Carya glabra var. hirsuta include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in digestion. Carya glabra var. hirsuta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in traditional medicine to make salves and creams.
